articles.description: During his speech at the Rare Evo 2023 convention, Charles Hoskinson, the Co-Founder and CEO of IOG (Input Output Global), the company behind Cardano’s research and development, made a bold prediction. Hoskinson said: “So, that is our challenge, and this is why I think that Cardano is probably going to become the biggest cryptocurrency in the world. […]
